message:
feat(fcp-e2e): Add CLI binary and expand test infrastructure

New fcp-e2e binary (src/bin/fcp-e2e.rs):
- Command-line tool for running E2E connector tests
- Supports individual test selection and filtering
- JSON output mode for CI integration

fcp-e2e lib.rs:
- Additional test helpers and report formatting

fcp-mesh/gossip.rs:
- Improve gossip protocol message handling
- Better peer discovery logic

fcp-bootstrap:
- cold_recovery.rs: Extend recovery state machine
- genesis.rs: Add genesis block validation helpers
- time_validation.rs: Refactor time bound checks

fcp-sandbox/tests:
- canary_connector.rs: Test fixture update

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
